front: What is the role of real-world evidence (RWE) in peptide drug development?
back: RWE from electronic health records, registries, and claims data supplements clinical trials. For peptides: 1) Long-term safety (immunogenicity, rare events), 2) Comparative effectiveness (head-to-head vs. standard care), 3) Dosing optimization in special populations, 4) Post-marketing surveillance, 5) Rare disease evidence generation.
